title: Assignment - Neural Network Design
description: Template for assignments asking students to design, implement, and analyze a neural network.

criteria.title: Architecture Design
criteria.description: Student designs a neural network architecture appropriate for the task.

levels.title: Complete
levels.description: Architecture is well-justified, correctly sized, and appropriate for the task.

levels.title: Substantial
levels.description: Mostly correct with minor design issues.

criteria.title: Training Setup
criteria.description: Student selects and justifies optimizer, loss function, regularization, and hyperparameters.

criteria.title: Results Analysis
criteria.description: Student analyzes training curves, evaluates performance, and identifies failure modes.

levels.title: Complete
levels.description: Thorough analysis with diagnosis and remediation suggestions.

criteria.title: Written Report
criteria.description: Student communicates methodology, results, and limitations clearly.
